data.title: Societe Generale's shares and voting rights as of 30 Sept 2025 were reported. Useful numbers were not provided.
data.description: As of September 30, 2025, the total number of shares comprising the current share capital and the overall number of voting rights were reported. This data is crucial for investors and stakeholders to gauge the company's ownership structure and decision-making capabilities. Having transparency regarding the number of shares outstanding and the corresponding voting rights is essential for maintaining an informed and efficient market environment.

data.title: Founder Tom Sosnoff of Thinkorswim and Tastytrade introduces Lossdog, encourages investors to assess their professional worth.
data.description: Tom Sosnoff, the founder of Thinkorswim and Tastytrade, is now advocating for investors to evaluate their own professional value with the launch of Lossdog. Sosnoff believes in the importance of assessing one's worth in the financial market. This move comes after the success of Thinkorswim and Tastytrade, highlighting the significance of understanding personal value in investment. Lossdog aims to provide investors with insights into their professional worth, emphasizing the need for self-assessment in financial endeavors.

data.title: Global RAG market set to exceed $40 billion by 2035 due to AI integration, with a 35.31% CAGR growth from $1.96 billion in 2025.
data.description: A report titled "Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Market Industry Trends and Global Forecasts to 2035" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for retrieval-augmented generation is projected to increase significantly from USD 1.96 billion in 2025 to USD 40.34 billion by 2035. This represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 35.31% during this period. The report analyzes various factors such as type of function, areas of application, types of deployment, technology, end-users, company size, and geographical regions in the market.

data.title: McLean & Company unveils agenda for Signature 2025 conference Nov 2-4 in Houston, with speakers from Peloton, Dayforce, Kyndryl, Bruce Power, and GE Appliances. Sessions focus on building human-centric, future-ready organizations.
data.description: The McLean Signature 2025 conference, scheduled for November 2-4 in Houston, Texas, features keynote speakers from prominent companies such as Peloton, Dayforce, Kyndryl, Bruce Power, and GE Appliances. The agenda includes a diverse range of sessions curated by a leading HR research and advisory firm, offering attendees valuable insights and knowledge-sharing opportunities.

data.title: China advancing market-oriented reform for renewable energy despite challenges, allowing producers to compete in grid market.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, in Beijing, a user on people.cn questioned why Chinese local authorities continue to push forward market-oriented reforms to enable renewable energy producers to participate in the grid electricity market despite facing challenges. The user highlighted the importance of implementing these reforms and allowing fair competition in the market.

data.title: CenCal Health introduces CenCal CareConnect, a new health plan for those eligible for Medicare and Medi-Cal.
data.description: In Santa Barbara, California, CenCal Health has introduced CenCal CareConnect, a novel health plan tailored for individuals eligible for both Medicare and Medi-Cal. The initiative aims to streamline healthcare services for this demographic in the region.
Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi: Wang: China salutes efforts to restore peace in Gaza, and we must pursue a two-state solution.

data.title: Inventor from Dudley, N.C. develops NITE WOLF modified vehicle windshield to enhance night vision.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 10, 2025, an inventor from Dudley, North Carolina, shared their innovation of the NITE WOLF, a modified vehicle windshield aimed at improving vision at night. The inventor expressed that driving at night can be challenging due to poor visibility and stated that their design seeks to address this issue. The NITE WOLF is intended to make it easier for individuals to see while driving in the dark, potentially helping to enhance safety on the road.

data.title: American Crane's CEO Karen Norheim debuts podcast "Always Lifting", exploring leadership, innovation, wellness - Oct 10, 2025.
data.description: In Douglassville, Pennsylvania on October 10, 2025, the American Crane & Equipment Corporation revealed the introduction of "Always Lifting," a fresh video podcast led by their CEO, Karen Norheim. The series probes into leadership, innovation, wellness, heritage, and grit with a captivating approach.
